tool_calls:
tmp=$(mktemp)
{
  IFS= read -r first < /doc/README.md
  printf '%s\n\n' "$first"
  grep -E '^#{1,2} ' /doc/README.md | while IFS= read -r line; do
    if [[ $line == '## '* ]]; then
      text=${line#'## '}
    elif [[ $line == '# '* ]]; then
      text=${line#'# '}
    else
      continue
    fi
    anchor=${text,,}
    anchor=${anchor// /-}
    printf '%s\n' "- [$text](#$anchor)"
  done
  printf '\n'
  # append body after the first heading, removing the previously inserted dashed placeholder if present
  tail -n +2 /doc/README.md | sed '/^----------$/d' | sed '1{/^$/d;}'
} > "$tmp"
mv "$tmp" /doc/README.md
cat /doc/README.md

line='# Project Alpha'; text=${line#'# '}; declare -p text
line='## Installation'; text=${line#'## '}; declare -p text
case "# Project Alpha" in '# '*) echo yes;; *) echo no;; esac

tmp=$(mktemp)
{
  IFS= read -r first < /doc/README.md
  printf '%s\n\n' "$first"
  grep -E '^#{1,2} ' /doc/README.md | while IFS= read -r line; do
    text=$(printf '%s\n' "$line" | sed -e 's/^## //' -e 's/^# //')
    anchor=${text,,}
    anchor=${anchor// /-}
    printf '%s\n' "- [$text](#$anchor)"
  done
  printf '\n'
  tail -n +2 /doc/README.md | sed '/^- \[/d' | sed ':a; /^$/ { N; ba }; s/^\n*//'
} > "$tmp"
mv "$tmp" /doc/README.md
cat /doc/README.md
